case_title: NATRAJ D MR. VS COBB JACKIE MS. et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-06-1992, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO AUG-05-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY NATRAJ D MR. AS TO DEFENDANT COBB JACKIE MS. PARKING COMPANY OF AMERICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-03-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NATRAJ D MR. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COBB JACKIE MS. PARKING COMPANY OF AMERICA EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-06-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00 TRIAL OF JUN-03-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
